name: Shrimp Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Gradually add flour, stirring constantly until smooth.
3. Add salt and white pepper to taste.
4. Stir in milk and cream, cooking on low heat until the mixture thickens slightly.
5. Reduce heat to low and stir in chopped parsley.
6. Add the cooked shrimp to the sauce and simmer for a few minutes until heated through.
7. Sprinkle with paprika before serving.
To be used on baked or poached fish.
